The Origin of Mutant Powers in 
Alpha Complex 
Beats us. Oh, sorry, we mean... i'sa secret! Of course. ‘That's much better Well, maybe The Computer knows, but it isn'ttelling, And lots of citizens have theories, bout theories (like rumors) are treason. Here are 2 few of the treasonous theories propounded by various Alpha Complex pundits «Radiation from a global nuclear war (con- 
tradicts Computer history and all available scientific evidence, but a. common legend, based on trashy Pre-Oops postholocaust, fiction). 6. Mutant Powers 
«The side-effects of pollution, food additives, and exposure to bland video programming, {based on other mythic materials from Pre- ops period). * Officially recognized andlor, clandestine genetic experiments carried out by The Com- puter/R& Disectet societies (positing biochem- ical oF radiological agents for mutations, and secret eugenics programs engineered by any ‘number of crackpot factions). * The cumulative effects of exposure to watches with radium dials. * The Earth’s passage through a cloud of cosmic dust. ‘ Benign interference by benevolent aliens 
and so on, ad nauseum, ‘Gamemasters are encouraged to be bland ly irresponsible in establishing an internally: Consistent rationale fr all this mutant power stuff, Change your tune at the drop of a hat. Whatever suits your dramatic and natrative needs, whenever you need it, for whatever hokey reason. Keep the players guessing Remember? Ignorance and fear. Fear and ignorance.
